  • Modules
  • Data Structures
  • Files
  • Examples

MiCA PKA TRNG Device API (gxio/pka.h)
[gxio Low-Level IO Device Control API]

Detailed Description

Incorporated into the PKA hardware module is a True Random Number Generator (TRNG).

The TRNG monitors integrated hardware noise sources, continually produces random numbers, and buffers them internally. These numbers can be extracted via the API functions here. Each call to a read function returns a different random number if one is available. The gxio_mica_pka_data_present() function can be polled to see if there is a number ready.

Functions

int gxio_mica_pka_trng_init (gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *context, int mica_index)
 Initialize the TRNG hardware module and return a handle that allows access it.
int gxio_mica_pka_trng_data_present (gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *context)
 Determine if a random number is available in the TRNG.
int gxio_mica_pka_trng_read32 (gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *context, uint32_t *data)
 Obtain a new 32-bit random integer.
int gxio_mica_pka_trng_read64 (gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *context, uint64_t *data)
 Obtain a new 64-bit random integer.

Function Documentation

int gxio_mica_pka_trng_init ( gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *  context,
int  mica_index 
)

Initialize the TRNG hardware module and return a handle that allows access it.

Parameters:
context Context to be initialized.
mica_index The index of the MiCA shim with which this context will be associated.
Returns:
0 on success, negative error code on failure.

int gxio_mica_pka_trng_data_present ( gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *  context  ) 

Determine if a random number is available in the TRNG.

Parameters:
context An initialized PKA TRNG context.
Returns:
1 if there is a random number available, 0 if not.

int gxio_mica_pka_trng_read32 ( gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *  context,
uint32_t *  data 
)

Obtain a new 32-bit random integer.

Parameters:
context An initialized PKA TRNG context.
data Pointer to the returned 32-bit random integer.
Returns:
0 if a random number was obtained, a negative value if not.

int gxio_mica_pka_trng_read64 ( gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *  context,
uint64_t *  data 
)

Obtain a new 64-bit random integer.

Parameters:
context An initialized PKA TRNG context.
data Pointer to the returned 64-bit random integer.
Returns:
0 if a random number was obtained, a negative value if not.
